core_design_principles: Zero animations or cartoon-like graphics (strictly functional and minimalist).
High-contrast readability tailored for mobile/touch interaction.
Precision-focused 'Control Room' dense grids for diagnostic information.

rules: No generic 'Inter' for headings. Use Outfit for a sleek, technical feel.
Never use pure center alignment for standard content; prioritize left-alignment for scannability.
Use mono font (JetBrains Mono) for diagnostic codes, part numbers, and VIN inputs.

spacing_and_layout.system: Generous Spacing System on outer bounds, dense internally.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use p-4 to p-6 for mobile outer padding.
rules: Mobile-first design: Components must span full width on small screens.
Avoid large, airy gaps inside diagnostic cards. Information should be dense and scannable like a professional mechanic's tool.
Flat backgrounds only. No gradients, no glassmorphism.
Use 1px solid borders (border-border/40) to define sections.
Border radius: max 4px (rounded-sm) for a sharp, 'steel' tool aesthetic.
Shadows: None. Rely on contrast and borders for depth.
NO ANIMATIONS. Disable standard hover/click transitions where possible. Changes should be instantaneous and sharp.
Active/Pressed states should invert colors or significantly darken the background.
Focus states MUST have a sharp 2px solid border (ring-0 ring-offset-0 border-[#808080]).

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-sm font-medium border-none
buttons.secondary: bg-[#141414] text-white border border-[#333333] hover:bg-[#292929] rounded-sm

inputs.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#333333] text-white rounded-sm placeholder-[#737373] focus:border-[#808080] focus:ring-0

chat_bubble.ai: bg-[#1F1F1F] border border-[#333333] rounded-sm p-4 text-white
chat_bubble.user: bg-[#292929] border border-[#4D4D4D] rounded-sm p-4 text-white

icons.style: Use sharp, 'steel-look' regular or duotone icons (e.g., wrench, gear, car, list-checks) to maintain the technical automotive feel.

rules: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.

image_urls.description: Sleek black BMW sedan, ideal for the vehicle profile or onboarding background.
Dark car emblem and fuel door, great for the parts recommendation section.
Dark mechanic shop scene for the nearby mechanics integration.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile-first React Native Expo / Web App hybrid. Ensure all interactive areas have a minimum touch target size of 44x44px.
Strictly adhere to the NO ANIMATIONS rule. Do not use Framer Motion. Do not apply transition-all in Tailwind.
Do NOT use glassmorphism. Stick to solid colors (Obsidian, Gunmetal) and 1px borders to achieve the requested steel look.
For the AI Diagnosis chat, display information in dense, structured data blocks (bento-style) rather than generic chat bubbles where possible.
Implement vendor parts links (AutoZone, Amazon) as sharp, rectangular action buttons with clear vendor logos/icons.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements for robust testing.
